title: TBench verifier dependency parity
prompt: FAKE_TBENCH_VERIFIER_DEPENDENCY_PARITY: read the visible verifier dependency contract and write the fallback verifier command plus assertion names.

commandChecks.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import ast, json
from pathlib import Path
payload = json.loads(Path('verifier-parity.json').read_text())
requirements = ast.literal_eval(Path('tests/verifier_requirements.py').read_text().split('=', 1)[1].split('\n', 1)[0].strip())
assert payload['source'] == 'visible-verifier', payload
assert payload['fallbackCommand'] == 'python3 -m pytest tests/test_outputs.py', payload
assert payload['assertions'] == requirements, payload
PY

constraints: when verifier dependencies are thin or unavailable, preserve the visible verifier assertion names
record a fallback command that exercises the same verifier-local assertions
